knowledge.html:
Danh sach Cum Dong Tu (Phrasal Verbs) thuong gap

STTCum dong tuNghia
1Act outDong vai, dong kich
2Account forChiem bao nhieu %, giai thich
3Ask for stXin cai gi
Ask afterHoi tham
Ask sb outMoi ai do di an/di xem phim de hen ho
4Break downChia nho ra, hong hoc, ngat xiu
Break intoDot nhap vao
Break outNo ra
Break upChia tay
5Bring sb upNuoi nang ai
Bring outLam noi bat
Bring aboutGay ra, mang lai
Bring backMang lai, goi nho
6Blow outThoi tat
7Build upTang len, ca ngoi
8Breathe in = take in = inhaleHit vao
9Calm downBinh tinh
10Clear outCuon xeo, don sach
11Care forCham soc, thich
Care aboutQuan tam
12Clean upDon dep
13Call forCan, doi hoi, yeu cau
Call outGoi to, het to
Call offHuy
Call upGoi cho ai/goi di linh
Carry onTiep tuc
Carry outTien hanh, thuc hien
Carry awayPhan khich, kich dong
Carry overChuyen vao, di vao
14Cut downChat/don
Cut offCat, cup, ngung cung cap (dien, gas...)
Cut inXen vao, ngat loi
Cut down onCat giam
15Crop upXay ra mot cach bat ngo
16Come up withNay ra y tuong
Come intoThua ke
Come upXay ra
Come outLo ra, lo ra, tung ra, phat hanh
Come onThoi nao, tiep tuc nao
Come offThanh cong
Come acrossTinh co gap
Come inBuoc vao
Come in forChuoc lay, nhan lay
Come aroundTinh lai
Come up toDat toi
17Dip intoDoc luot
18Die outTuyet chung
Die ofChet vi benh gi
19Dress upCai trang, dong gia
20Drop out ofBo cuoc
Drop in on = pay a short visitTat qua, ghe qua
21Fall overDo sup xuong, nga, pha san
Fall forMe tit, yeu ai
Fall behindTut lai, cham lai
Fall back onPhai can toi, phai dung toi
Fall out withCai co voi
22Fill inDien vao mau don
Fill upDo day, lam day
Fill outMap ra, beo ra
23Grow upLon len
24Jot down = note downGhi tom tat
25Go throughTrai qua
Go aheadTien hanh
Go on with st = continue with stTiep tuc voi cai gi
Go outMat dien, ra ngoai, di choi
Go on = continueTiep tuc
Go awayDi xa, di di, cut di
Go backQuay lai
Go back onThat hua
Go beyondVuot qua
Go offDo chuong, no tung, thiu thoi, mat hung
Go overXem lai, on lai
Go byTroi qua, tuot mat
Go up >< go downTang len >< giam xuong
Go down withMac benh
Go in forThich thu, tham gia
Go intoDieu tra, xem xet
26Get around = travelDi lai
Get over = recover fromVuot qua cu soc/benh tat
Get throughVuot qua ki thi, hoan thanh
Get intoQuan tam, hung thu voi cai gi
Get byXoay so de song qua kho khan
Get offXuong xe/tau/may bay
Get onLen xe/tau/may bay
27Give up = stop = quitTu bo
Give offToa ra, nha ra, thai ra
Give inNhan nhuong
Give outCan kiet
Give awayTiet lo, phan phat
28Hold up = delayDinh tre, tri hoan
Hold backNgan lai
Hold onCho; giu chac; cam
Hold overHoan
29Hurry upNhanh len
30Hand outPhan phat
Hand inNop
31Keep up/pace with = catch up withTheo kip, duoi kip
Keep onTiep tuc
Keep awayTranh xa
Keep in withDuy tri moi quan he tot dep voi ai
32Look upTra cuu
Look after = take care ofCham soc
Look aroundNgo nghieng, tham thu
Look down onCoi thuong
Look up toKinh trong
Look atNgam nhin
Look forTim kiem
Look forward toMong cho
Look intoDieu tra, xem xet
Look out (for)Coi chung, trong chung
Look overXem qua
33Lie downNam nghi
34Lay downDe ra
35Mull overSuy nghi ki
36Make up forBu dap cho
Make upTrang diem, bia dat, dung chuyen, quyet dinh, lam hoa, chiem (ti le, %)
Be made up ofTao nen boi
Make away withCuom di
Make forTien ve huong
Make outNhin, nhan ra, hieu
37Pick upNhat; don
38Point atChi vao
39Pray forCau nguyen
40Pass away = dieQua doi/chet
Pass downLuu truyen, truyen lai
Pass overLo di, ne tranh
41Put up with = tolerateChiu dung
Put acrossTrinh bay, giai thich
Put onMac, doi; bieu dien
Put offTri hoan; khien cho ai khong con thich nua
Put asideDe danh
Put awayDon di, cat di, de danh
Put backTra lai (dua ve dung vi tri)
Put throughKet noi dien thoai
Put upDung len
Put sb upCho ai do o nho
Put outDap tat
42Pull downUi do, pha bo
43Result inDan den
44Run on stChay bang cai gi
Run offBo di, rua troi
Run out of stHet sach, het nhan cai gi
Run outCan kiet
Slow downLam giam
Speed upTang toc
45Settle downOn dinh, dinh cu
46Start upKhoi nghiep
47Save upTiet kiem
48Set outBat dau thuc hien mot ke hoach/hanh dong
Set upThanh lap
Set offKhoi hanh
49Stand in for sbLam thay cho ai
Stand upDung len
Stand forViet tat, tuong trung cho
Stand outNoi bat
Stand up forUng ho
50Ponder on/upon/overSuy nghi ve, can nhac ve; tram tu
51Show offKhoe khoang
Show up = turn up = arriveDen
52Stay upThuc
53Spread overKeo dai
54Think back on = recallHoi tuong lai, nho lai
55Talk back to sbCai lai, noi lai
56Take afterGiong
Take offCoi, cat canh, thanh cong
Take inHap thu, hit vao, hieu
Take outNho, do
Take awayMang di, keo theo
Take onDam nhiem, thue muon
Take overTiep quan, chiem doat
Take upBat dau mot thoi quen/so thich
57Turn on >< turn offBat >< tat
Turn up = show up = arriveDen
Turn intoBien thanh
Turn outHoa ra
Turn downTu choi, van nho
58Try out = testKiem tra
Try onThu do
59Throw awayVut di
60Wipe outXoa so
61Wake upThuc giac
62Wind down = relaxThu gian
63Wait for sb/stDoi ai/doi cai gi
64Wash awayCuon troi
Wash upGiat, rua
65Use up = run outDung het, can kiet

exercises.question: Since Carl was unable to pay his bill, after a couple of months, his telephone was _______.
exercises.explanation: 'Cut off' = ngung cung cap (dien, gas, dien thoai). Khong tra tien thi bi cat dien thoai.

exercises.question: I can_______ the house being messy, but I hate it if it's not clean.
exercises.explanation: 'Put up with' = chiu dung. 'I can put up with...' = toi co the chiu dung duoc...

exercises.question: Belinda Harrell_______ taking her driving test until she finally passed it on her twenty-first attempt.
exercises.explanation: 'Kept on' = tiep tuc (lam gi do). Co ay tiep tuc thi lai xe cho den khi dau.

exercises.question: James is now too old to live on his own, so he is being_______ by his daughter.
exercises.explanation: 'Looked after' = cham soc. Con gai dang cham soc ong ay.

exercises.question: We arranged to meet at the station, but she didn't_______.
exercises.explanation: 'Turn up' = xuat hien, den. Co ay da khong den.

exercises.question: Don't worry we'll have to wait a little longer because I'm sure he will_______.
exercises.explanation: 'Turn up' = den, xuat hien. Toi chac anh ay se den.

exercises.question: When they_______ for the beach the sun was shining, but by the time they arrived it had clouded over.
exercises.explanation: 'Set off' = khoi hanh. Khi ho khoi hanh di bien thi troi dang nang.

exercises.question: When Mr. Spendthrift ran out of money, he_______ his mother for help.
exercises.explanation: 'Fell back on' = phai nho den, phai dung toi. Het tien thi phai nho me giup.

exercises.question: If you can't remember his phone number, you can always_______ it_______ in the phone book.
exercises.explanation: 'Look up' = tra cuu. Ban co the tra so dien thoai trong danh ba.

exercises.question: The train to the center of the city was_______ by a heavy snowfall.
exercises.explanation: 'Held up' = bi tri hoan. Tau bi tri hoan vi tuyet roi day.

exercises.question: My hat has just_______ behind the sofa although I thought I had lost it.
exercises.explanation: 'Turned up' = xuat hien (bat ngo). Chiec mu bat ngo xuat hien phia sau sofa.

exercises.question: Jim's_______ flu again. That's the third time this year.
exercises.explanation: 'Gone down with' = mac benh. Jim lai bi cum lan nua.

exercises.question: Considering how little they have got in common, it's surprising how well they_______ together.
exercises.explanation: 'Get on' = hoa hop, hoa thuan. Ho hoa thuan voi nhau rat tot.

exercises.question: Her brother was offered the manager's job, but he_______. He said he didn't want the responsibilities.
exercises.explanation: 'Turned it down' = tu choi. Anh ay tu choi cong viec quan ly.

exercises.question: Roger Federer couldn't _______ the possibility of withdrawing from the championship because of injury.
exercises.explanation: 'Rule out' = loai tru. Khong the loai tru kha nang rut lui vi chan thuong.

exercises.question: He is disappointed at not being offered the job, but I think he will_______ it.
exercises.explanation: 'Get over' = vuot qua. Toi nghi anh ay se vuot qua noi that vong.

exercises.question: Lucy was late for school this morning because the alarm didn't_______ as usual.
exercises.explanation: 'Go off' = do chuong, reo. Dong ho bao thuc khong reo.

exercises.question: His son_______ him so much that we can't see any differences between them.
exercises.explanation: 'Takes after' = giong (nguoi than). Con trai giong bo den noi khong thay su khac biet.

exercises.question: My sister-in-law is beloved by all my relatives for she can_______ all right after getting married.
exercises.explanation: 'Get on well with' = hoa thuan voi. Chi dau hoa thuan voi tat ca nguoi than.

exercises.question: I know we had an argument, but now I'd quite like to_______.
exercises.explanation: 'Make up' = lam hoa. Sau khi cai nhau, toi muon lam hoa.
